title: athyrium cyclosorum
intro: Athyrium cyclosorum is a species of fern, also known as the Sickle-lobed Lady Fern, belonging to the Athyrium genus of plants. The leaves of this fern have been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where they are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium cyclosorum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
